module.enter_game.description:
### Tips
* Please select the server in Settings first.
* After enabling auto launch, scheduled tasks can automatically start the game.
* Please fill in the game installation path shown in the launcher.
module.enter_game.log.detected_that_the_: Detected that the game process started by the program is still running, skipping duplicate launch
module.enter_game.log.failed_to_resolve_: Failed to resolve launch arguments, start_path: {start_path}, game_channel: {game_channel}
module.enter_game.title: Auto Login
module.enter_game.ui.game_exe_not_found_: Game.exe executable not found, please check the path: {start_path}
module.enter_game.ui.launch_cooldown_in_: Launch cooldown in effect, retry after {remain}s
module.enter_game.ui.不管你是哪个渠道服玩家_第一步都应该先:
No matter which server/channel you are playing on, the first step is to select the server in Settings.
For the international version, you can choose a directory similar to "E:\SteamLibrary\steamapps\common\SNOWBREAK".
For the official server and Bilibili server, please first open the Snowbreak launcher and check the game installation directory in the launcher settings.
Then select that directory in the path below.
module.task_enter_game.description:
### Tips
* Please select the server in Settings first.
* After enabling auto launch, scheduled tasks can automatically start the game.
* Please fill in the game installation path shown in the launcher.
